message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should return premium 5 G for an empty item list — only the processing fee"
Expected behavior: claimOffice({customer: {yearsWithMHPCO: 0}, steps: [{op: "quote", items: []}]}) returns {results: [{premium: 5}]}
Current error: Expected { results: [{ premium: 5 }] }, received undefined
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Write the minimal code to make this test pass. A hardcoded return is fine at this stage.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll start by reading the test file and implementation file to understand the current state.

1	import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";
2	import { claimOffice } from "./claim-office.js";

18	    expect(result).toEqual({ results: [{ premium: 5 }] });

166

191	  );
192

195	  );
196	
197	  // ─── Claim: Rounding Payouts Down ─────────────────────────────────
198	
199	  it.todo(

203	  // ─── Edge Cases: Error Handling ───────────────────────────────────
